description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low stone or concrete wall, featuring a sloped gable roof with dark shingles. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small porch, a glass door, and large rectangular windows, while the driveway leads to a covered carport with two parked vehicles. The property is landscaped with several mature trees, bushes, and a manicured lawn, and the backyard contains a patio area with outdoor furniture and a hot tub. The side of the house facing the street is lined with a series of trash bins and recycling containers. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored horizontal siding, and the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The house is set in an urban context, with a paved road and sidewalk running alongside the property.
description: A modern two-story house with a sloped gable roof, large windows, a carport, and landscaped yard, surrounded by a low wall and set in an urban neighborhood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, flower beds, driveway, carport with two cars, and trash bins along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, rear lawn, backyard trees, and the paved road running parallel to the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with patio furniture, hot tub, and asymmetrical window arrangement on the upper floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, more trees, and the continuation of the street and sidewalk.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door, small porch, flower beds, and minimal overhang
